product_name: Gyeon Tire Applicator Lastik Parlatıcı Sünger Büyük Boy 2'li Paket

sources.cleaned_content:
# Q²M TIRE APPLICATOR

## Exterior / Accessories

### Tyre dressing applicators

Q²M Tire Applicator is designed to make tyre dressing application precise, clean and efficient. Its curved foam shape and firm grip allow controlled work on all tyre profiles, from low profile sport tyres to high wall SUV rubber.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/productmain_1700x1645px_tire_applicator_big_2020-1024x991.png)

## Tyre dressing applicators

The applicator's high density foam spreads tyre dressings evenly without excessive product use. Its ergonomic shape supports accurate application across the entire tyre sidewall, helping achieve a uniform finish while minimising waste.

### What makes Q²M TIRE APPLICATOR so special?

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/rolls-royce-x-rs-x-gyeon-x-kaczy-107-683x1024.jpg)

Curved foam shape for precise tyre dressing application

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640accessoriestireapplicator.webp)

BOX CONTAINS: 2 Tire Applicator - SMALL or LARGE

## HOW TO USE

01. Choose the applicator size appropriate for the tyre profile.
02. Apply tyre dressing directly onto the foam surface.
03. Spread evenly across the tyre sidewall.
04. Use controlled pressure for uniform coverage.
05. Rinse or replace applicator after use if required.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01. What is Q²M Tire Applicator used for?
Applying tyre dressings evenly and precisely.

02. Why are two sizes available?
Small is suited for low profile tyres, Large for high wall tyres.

03. Does it waste product?
No, the foam structure helps distribute dressing efficiently.

04. Is it comfortable to use?
Yes, the applicator offers a firm grip and ergonomic shape.

05. Can it be reused?
Yes, with proper cleaning after use.

## Recommended Pairing

- Q² TIRE - 500 ML - World's first SiO2 based tire sealant.
- Q²M TIRE EXPRESS - 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML - The quick and easy way to make your tyres look clean and fresh.
- Q²M TIRE CLEANER - 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML - Strong and effective tyre and rubber cleaner.
- Q²M TIREBRUSH - Chemical resistant stiff-hair brush to clean all rubber surfaces.

# Gyeon Q²M Tire Applicator Lastik Parlatıcı Sünger Büyük Boy 2'li Paket

![image](https://www.detailingexpress.com.tr/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Gyeon-Q²M-Tire-Applicator-Lastik-Parlatici-Sunger-Buyuk-Boy-2li-Paket-1200x1200.webp)

GYEON Q²M Tire Applicator, dayanıklı tutma bölümü ve kavisli sünger yapısı sayesinde tüm lastiklerde etkili ve mükemmel bir uygulama sağlar. Q²M Tire ya da Q²M TireExpress lastik parlatıcılarını, minimum efor ve ürün sarfiyatı ile ellerinizi kirletmeden lastiklerinize uygulayabilirsiniz.

BARKOD: 8690000027927

Stok kodu: 5331548

Marka: Gyeon

Fiyat: 359,17₺

Stok: 10 adet stokta

## Ürün Açıklaması

GYEON Q²M Tire Applicator, dayanıklı tutma bölümü ve kavisli sünger yapısı sayesinde tüm lastiklerde etkili ve mükemmel bir uygulama sağlar. Q²M Tire ya da Q²M TireExpress lastik parlatıcılarını, minimum efor ve ürün sarfiyatı ile ellerinizi kirletmeden lastiklerinize uygulayabilirsiniz.

GYEON Q²M Tire Applicator, yoğun gözenekli süngeri ve büyük boyutu ile tüm araç lastiklerinde yüksek performans ve kullanım kolaylığı sunar. Lastik parlatıcınızı homojen bir şekilde uygulamanızda en büyük destekçiniz olur.

KUTU İÇERİĞİ:
2 Adet Lastik Aplikatörü – BÜYÜK

## Müşteri Yorumları

Henüz değerlendirme yapılmamıştır.

# GYEON - Q²M Tire Applicator - Large, Pack of 2

Part: BRNGTIALRG2

![image](https://mcprod.gsfcarparts.com/media/catalog/product/g/t/gtialrg2.jpg)

In Stock

Price: £6.50

## Description

Elevate your tyre maintenance routine with the GYEON Q²M Tire Applicator, a meticulously crafted tool designed to deliver precision and ease in tyre dressing application. Available in a convenient large size and packaged in sets of two.

**Features:**

- **Precision Application:** Designed for even and efficient tyre dressing application across different tyre types.
- **Durable Design:** Made from high-quality materials, ensuring longevity and repeated use.
- **User-Friendly:** Easy to handle with a strong grip and curved foam shape for effective coverage.
- **Versatile Use:** Suitable for low-profile sport tyres and high-wall SUV tyres, offering broad applicability.
- **Enhanced Maintenance:** Maintains tyres' pristine appearance, contributing to overall vehicle aesthetics.

The Q²M Tire Applicator is engineered for optimal performance with its strong grip and curved foam shape, ensuring that you can apply your chosen tyre dressing evenly and effectively across the tyre's surface.

## Info

- Brand: GYEON
- Quantity: Pack of 2
- Smooth Application: Ensures uniform tyre dressing on all types.
- Sturdy Build: Crafted for durability and repeated use.
- Comfort Grip: Ergonomic foam shape for easy handling.
- Universal Fit: Ideal for sport and SUV tyres.
- Keeps Tyres Fresh: Helps maintain a clean, polished look.

Q²M Tire Applicators come in two sizes – small and large – each with a different dedication. No matter if you need to coat low profile sport tyres or high wall SUV rubber, there is a solution ready. With its strong grip and curved foam shape, it allows you to work in every area effectively and precisely.

With its curved shape and high-density foam, applying tire dressing becomes a child's play! It helps spread the dressing in a more uniform way with no waste.

sources.cleaned_content:
# Gyeon Q2M Tire Applicator (2 Pack)

Brand: GYEON

SKU: 116129

Price: $8.99 AUD

Variants: Small / Large

![image](//www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116129_1_1.jpg?v=1717826974&width=1000)
![image](//www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116130_1_1_ec1929cb-dd18-41d2-afdc-b5fcd088c75e.jpg?v=1727058654&width=1000)

## Description

Gyeon Q²M Tire Applicators come in two sizes – small and large – each with a different dedication. No matter if you need to coat low profile sport tyres or high wall SUV rubber, there is a solution ready. With its strong grip and curved foam shape, it allows you to work in every area effectively and precisely.

### Features & Benefits

- Soft, durable foam construction for even and streak-free application
- Ergonomic handle for comfortable grip and control
- Precision-cut foam contours to tire sidewalls for maximum coverage
- Compatible with all Gyeon tire coatings and most other tire dressings
- Reusable and easy to clean

The Gyeon Q2M Tire Applicator is a must-have tool for anyone looking to get the most out of their tire coatings. Made from high-quality foam, this applicator provides even and streak-free application of your favorite tire coatings, ensuring maximum coverage and a long-lasting shine. The precision-cut foam contours perfectly to your tire sidewalls, making it easy to apply the coating exactly where you want it.

The ergonomic handle provides a comfortable grip and ultimate control, while the durable foam construction ensures long-lasting use. This applicator is also compatible with all Gyeon tire coatings and most other tire dressings, making it a versatile tool for any detailing enthusiast. And when you're done, simply rinse the applicator under running water and let it air dry for easy cleaning and reuse.
